title: sigpath catalog device
description: Source spec for one community device. id, source, rev and contentHash are derived by the build (scripts/build-snapshot.mjs), never stored in the file. The file path is the id.

manufacturer.description: Brand. Omit for generic gear (it then lives under devices/generic/).

rackUnits.description: Height in 19" rack units, for the rack-elevation view.

sourceUrl.description: Citation — the manufacturer spec page / datasheet the port data was taken from. Kept in the published snapshot.

confidence.description: Reviewer aid — how sure we are of the port data. Build-time only; not published. Spot-check the low/medium ones.

notes.description: Internal notes (variant caveats, ambiguities). Build-time only; not published.

connector.description: An id from connectors/connectors.json — the port type, source of truth for color/cabling/validation. The build cross-checks it.

accepts.description: Additional connector ids this one physical jack also mates with (e.g. a combo XLR/TRS input). Each is cross-checked against the vocabulary.

grade.description: Max bandwidth grade this port supports — an id from grades/grades.json, and it must belong to the connector's grade scale (the build cross-checks both). Omit for ungraded connectors (analog audio, power, control), which are never grade-checked.
